chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4544 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.18942/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 6 3. For order on Misc. No.18943/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 22.9.2025 Petitioner Muhammad Wahid is present in person -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. Petitioner Muhammad Wahid has sought quashment of FIR No.155 of 2023, registered under Sections 354/427/457/504/506-B/34 PPC at Police Station Shershah, Karachi. However, he has conceded that he has been acquitted in respect of the aforesaid FIR. He also claims that he has been harassed by the official respondents. The official respondents are directed not to harass the petitioner and to act strictly in accordance with law. Any monetary claim which he may have, he may, if so advised, file a civil suit. A copy of this order shall be sent to the I.G. Police Sindh, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
